steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a subject-verb agreement question. The subject is "The question," a singular noun. The long relative clause ("of what cross-cultural traits… in the first place") modifies it but does not change its number. The blank must be a singular finite verb.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — animates: Singular present-tense verb; agrees with the singular head noun "question." ✓
  • Choice B — have animated: Plural present-perfect verb; violates subject-verb agreement with singular "question." ✗
  • Choice C — animate: Bare-plural verb form; violates subject-verb agreement with singular "question." ✗
  • Choice D — animating: Nonfinite present participle; cannot serve as the finite main verb of the clause, leaving the sentence without a finite verb. ✗
That is the correct answer.
